programs.title: Chris Fleming: Live at the Palace
programs.desc: Comedian Chris Fleming bursts onto the screen with a fun and lighthearted blend of skillful storytelling and wild physicality in his first HBO stand-up special. A high-energy performer who seamlessly pivots from one everyday topic to another - from Trader Joe's to Oreos, NPR, and dog breeds - Fleming bounds across the stage as he shares his unique takes on masculinity, conga lines, and more.

programs.title: Fackham Hall
programs.desc: Eric Noone begins a forbidden romance with Rose Davenport, the lady of the house at a posh English manor. When an unexpected murder occurs, Eric gets framed, leaving Rose and her family's future uncertain.

programs.title: Martin Lawrence: You So Crazy
programs.desc: Filmed at a sold-out Majestic Theater in Brooklyn, N.Y., comedian Martin Lawrence delivers his first full-length stand-up special. Harking back to Eddie Murphy, the leather-clad comic riffs on drugs, jail, his impoverished upbringing with his mother and his luck -- or lack thereof -- with women. He also speaks at length about racism and the Rodney King ruling and subsequent riots. Lawrence even offers his unique perspective on how to maintain a successful relationship.

programs.title: Starter for 10
programs.desc: Brian Jackson (James McAvoy), a working-class youth from Essex, gets a chance to prove himself when he is accepted to respected Bristol University. As Brian navigates his way through his first year there, he finds romance with two pretty students (Alice Eve, Rebecca Hall) and tries out for a popular TV program called "University Challenge.".

programs.title: The Day the Earth Blew Up: A Looney Tunes Movie
programs.desc: Porky Pig and Daffy Duck become Earth's only hope when their antics at the local bubble-gum factory uncover a secret alien mind-control plot. Faced with cosmic odds, they must save their town and the world while not driving each other totally loony.

programs.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
programs.desc: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.
